category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Mint as a package manager for executable Swift packages.
source_facts.description says it installs and runs Swift command-line tool packages.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Mint.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and contains installation, usage, Mintfile, and support sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/yonaskolb/Mint, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists topics including swift, package-manager, dependency-manager, spm, and command-line-tool.
source_facts.description identifies Swift command-line tool package management.
